channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A pothole in the road just before coming to the end of the restricted speed limit., 7th April
item.description:
Pothole between the 2 lanes, heading up from the roundabout towards Birdlip. Close to the yellow grit bin and across from where the old Air Balloon pub used to be.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Birdlip, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped bike, 7th April
item.description:
Bike with missing front wheel at top of slope
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped furniture, 7th April
item.description:
Various items of furniture tipped in alley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, New Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path uneven, broken and lifted due to tenents at 36 using the area as a drive., 7th April
item.description:
The whole path. It's lifted, paving slabs have been broken and split and are raised. The area is incredibly dangerous for any pedestrians and could cause harm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Gwernant Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Dangerous metal gates placed in field boundaries, 7th April
item.description:
No footpath signs, no stiles and dangerous metal gates with barbed wire obstructing the footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath blocked by locked gates, 7th April
item.description:
Along the driveway to farm buildings. Also no stiles or access further along the footpath and crops plates dangerously close to River Chelt with no boundary to walk along.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Withybridge Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barbed wire through tree, 7th April
item.description:
Bridlepath/footpath behind 18 Greenwood Drive, Stoke Orchard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 7th April
item.description:
Wardrobe flytipped just off Brunswick street towards Hanover Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, Brunswick Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence to dog field is rotten and not secure, 7th April
item.description:
The last section of the fence at the cutbridge field in the very corner where it meets the ajoining property is rotten and not secure. Multiple dogs have managed to get over the corner and onto the road. The beams of the fence are almost completed detached in places.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cutbridge Meadow, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree on roadside is blocking my driveway, 7th April
item.description:
Fallen tree has smashed onto car on road and is now blocking my driveway access. I need it removing immediately to access the car and ev charger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Barbridge Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th April
item.description:
Permanent repair Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 1300x1200x80mm tarmac parch (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th April
item.description:
NWD carriage way pothole 1300x1200x80mm tarmac parch make safe (CW6 Pothole)

item.description:
